1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a stringed instrument; by extension, a poem set to music; specifically, an epigram
David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

2.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
2.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

2.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
2.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

2.gl: to hide (by covering), literally or figuratively
2.kj: be absent, keep close, conceal, hide (self), (keep) secret, [idiom] surely.

2.gl: Shaul, the name of an Edomite and two Israelites
David, the youngest son of Jesse
2.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

3.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
3.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

3.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
3.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

3.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
3.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

3.gl: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
3.kj: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
3.dv: feminine passive participle from the same as H1368 (גִּבּוֹר);

3.gl: a straight course, i.e. sail direct

4.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)

4.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
4.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

4.gl: to broaden out the ear (with the hand), i.e. (by implication) to listen
4.kj: give (perceive by the) ear, hear(-ken). See H239 (אָזַן).
4.dv: a primitive root; probably to expand; but used only as a denominative from H241 (אֹזֶן);

4.kj: answer, [idiom] appointed unto him, saying, speech, word.

4.gl: intercession, supplication; by implication, a hymn

5.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)

5.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

5.gl: a front, i.e. part opposite; specifically a counterpart, or mate; usually (adverbial, especially with preposition) over against or before
5.kj: about, (over) against, [idiom] aloof, [idiom] far (off), [idiom] from, over, presence, [idiom] other side, sight, [idiom] to view.

5.gl: to turn aside (especially for lodging); hence to be aforeigner, strange, profane; specifically (active participle) to commit adultery
5.kj: (come from) another (man, place), fanner, go away, (e-) strange(-r, thing, woman).

6.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
6.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

6.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
6.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

6.gl: to prop (literally or figuratively); reflexively, to lean upon or take hold of (in a favorable or unfavorable sense)
6.kj: bear up, establish, (up-) hold, lay, lean, lie hard, put, rest self, set self, stand fast, stay (self), sustain.

6.gl: the Lord (used as a proper name of God only)
to surround, i.e. protect or aid
